title: Samagra Shiksha Axom Officer In charge Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Samagra Shiksha Axom Officer In charge Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of Samagra Shiksha Axom. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SSA Officer In charge Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Axom Officer In charge Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Samagra Shiksha Axom Officer In charge Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of Samagra Shiksha Axom. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SSA Officer In charge Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 62 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree with 5 years of relevant experience at District and State level position in any Govt. Deptt
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree with 5 years of relevant experience at District and State level position in any Govt. Deptt., Society, University, College, Reputed Research Organization and with minimum three (3) years working experience with an organization dealing with education of children with disabilities. Candidate must have: Registered Member of Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Degree/ Diploma in Special Education

selection_process: Test/Interview Merit List based on General Awareness
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Samagra Shiksha Axom to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Samagra Shiksha Axom recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the Samagra Shiksha Axom Officer In-charge, Inclusive Education recruitment is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Officer In-charge post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree with 5 years of relevant experience, a Registered Member of RCI, and a Degree/Diploma in Special Education to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 1,10,000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification states that there is no application fee for any category, including General/OBC and SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Officer In-charge, Inclusive Education post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 62 years for all posts mentioned in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Officer In-charge position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test/Interview, followed by the creation of a Merit List based on General Awareness, Personality & Aptitude, Subject matter expertise, and Relevant Experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Officer In-charge, Inclusive Education in Samagra Shiksha Axom.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of Samagra Shiksha Axom.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Officer In-charge, Inclusive Education is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
